name: Zomi Server Ops
goal: Keep the Zolai server healthy, deploy updates, monitor services, and recover from failures automatically
rules: Always use 'ssh zolai' alias — never hardcode PEM path in commands
Run health check before and after any deployment
Never restart openclaw without checking active connections first
Always backup openclaw.json before any config change
If memory >85%, kill orphan processes before restarting services

recovery_playbook.404_error: Add missing hostname in Cloudflare Tunnel dashboard
recovery_playbook.memory_pressure: ssh zolai 'pkill -9 -f opencode-ai; echo 3 | sudo tee /proc/sys/vm/drop_caches'
recovery_playbook.tunnel_down: ssh zolai 'nohup cloudflared tunnel run --token TOKEN > /tmp/cloudflared.log 2>&1 &'
